name: Stevie Nicks
abstract: Stephanie Lynn Nicks (born May 26, 1948) is an American singer-songwriter, known for her work with the band Fleetwood Mac and as a solo artist. After starting her career as a duo with her then-boyfriend Lindsey Buckingham, releasing the album Buckingham Nicks to little success, the pair joined Fleetwood Mac in 1975, helping the band to b…

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Barbutti
about_quotes.evidence: there’s a girl who did an impersonation of Stevie Nicks, who is a rock & roll singer
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Barbutti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 8, 2022
